title: A group of firefighters reported a cone shaped UFO near Porto Velho-RO [1994]

text_preview: JUN 19th, 1994. Time: 23:55. Duration: not determined. A group of firefighters in the region of Porto Velho, State of Rondônia, observed several appearances of an unidentified flying object performing a “curvilinear, anti-clockwise” trajectory, and flying slowly towards the RD076 highway, near Porto Velho. According to the firefighters who reported the sighting, the UFO “looked like a cone (oval)”, it was big and red. The object was between FL090 [9.000ft] and FL150 [15.000ft], and between RDL 010 and RDL 085. The witnesses stated that “each apparition lasted an average of 5 minutes”. Firstly
summary: Firefighters near Porto Velho-RO observed a large red cone-shaped UFO making anti-clockwise curvilinear passes, each lasting ~5 min, on June 19, 1994.
